sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، مُسَاعَدَةُ الْآخَرِينَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَيَاةَ أَجْمَلَ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, pomaganje drugima čini život ljepšim.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, helping others makes life more beautiful.
When you help someone you feel happy.

sentences.arabic: أُحَاوِلُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ أَنْ أَفْعَلَ شَيْئًا طَيِّبًا لِشَخْصٍ آخَرَ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan pokušavam nešto lijepo učiniti za drugu osobu.
sentences.translationEn: Every day I try to do something kind for another person.

sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ الْعَالَمَ يَصِيرُ أَفْضَلَ بِالتَّعَاوُنِ.
sentences.translation: Mislim da suradnjom svjet postaje bolji.
sentences.translationEn: I think the world becomes better through cooperation.
